description: Van wouldn't start this morning. Battery dead. Had to call for jump start from operations.
resolution_notes: Operations provided jump start. Tour delayed 25 min but completed successfully.

description: Guest felt dizzy during hike to cenote. Possible dehydration. Gave water and rest.
resolution_notes: Guest recovered after 30 min rest. Completed tour with no further issues.

description: Traffic jam on highway 307. Construction zone. Running 20 min behind schedule.
resolution_notes: Alternative route found. Made up time. Tour on schedule by lunch.

description: Guest upset about cenote being closed due to maintenance. Had to substitute with different cenote.
resolution_notes: Explained situation. Guest understood. Alternative cenote was actually better. Guest happy.

description: Sudden tropical storm. Had to take shelter in restaurant for 45 min. Lightning very close.
column10: Storm passed. Tour resumed. Completed all activities with modified schedule.
